mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_notice
AND (title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR author_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_message
AND (title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR sender_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR receiver_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_prayer
AND (title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR member_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_newsletter
AND (title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR author_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
